status_note: All 3 integration tests not yet written. Low priority — core secrets functionality is working.
description: Remaining work for SDK-only secrets — integration tests only. Steps 1-5 are complete.

completed_steps.step-3: Secrets config loader — buildSecretsAdapter() in src/composition-root.ts
completed_steps.step-4: CLI 'hex secrets' subcommands — src/adapters/primary/cli-adapter.ts + MCP tools in mcp-adapter.ts
completed_steps.step-5: Composition root wiring — fully wired with Infisical/LocalVault/Env selection

steps.description: Integration test: config-based adapter selection end-to-end. Create temp .hex/secrets.json with each backend type (env, infisical, local-vault), call buildSecretsAdapter(), verify correct adapter is returned.
Integration test: LocalVault round-trip. Create vault with password, add 3 secrets, resolve each, remove one, verify removal. Test wrong-password rejection.
Integration test: composition root secrets field is always non-null. Boot AppContext with no config, with env-only config, verify secrets field is populated and resolveSecret works.
